summary: Start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 after M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 closed in origin/main through PR #226. The task must migrate default player-facing prototype content away from hidden rectangular, hex, sequential-id, or regular-lattice topology.

tests_run.result: Local main already up to date with origin/main at 4c39b829456cc35adca2a56ff9390b32cd651ba8.

decisions.decision: Start fixture migration only after schema closure entered origin/main.
The default player-facing fixture must use explicit topology and route graph data, not row/column, hex axial/cube, sequential-id, or regular-lattice adjacency hidden behind irregular drawing.
Do not start M7 exit or approve content lock during fixture work.

risks.summary: Prototype map content may be mistaken for formal historical borders or routes.
risks.mitigation: Use low-fidelity COMPOSITE districts unless historical_researcher records source-backed claims; route review to historical_researcher.

risks.summary: A fixture can look irregular while still deriving authority from a grid or sequential id order.
risks.mitigation: Add content compiler negatives and fixture tests for visual-neighbor-without-route, visually-distant-explicit-route, no grid/hex/lattice shortcuts, and stable explicit route tie-break ids.

requested_action: Implement M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 within allowed paths and return a REVIEW handoff to historical_researcher with required tests and diff evidence.
